text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... It seems my skin's flaring up. Perhaps it's
due to the experiment?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I was very careful with the chemicals.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's just a little rough, nothing severe.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You hadn't noticed before I said anything, which
means it's no big deal.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just forget about it. If it gets worse, I'll make
some ointment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her telling me to not worry, she keeps
messing with her skin as if it hurts or itches.
